steps.name: Given user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "admin_password"
When user navigates to "Videos" section of Manage
When user "searches" the entity "natureVideo" from Manage "Videos" using Filter "Latest First"
When the user deletes video/podcast/shortVideo from "manage" page
